fields.name: client_id
fields.title: Client ID
fields.description: The client ID of your Google Search Console developer application.

fields.name: client_secret
fields.title: Client Secret
fields.description: The client secret of your Google Search Console developer application.

fields.name: refresh_token
fields.title: Refresh Token
fields.description: The refresh token for obtaining new access tokens.

replication_config.title: Replication Configuration
replication_config.description: Settings for data replication from Google Search Console.

fields.name: site_urls
fields.title: Website URL Property
fields.description: The URLs of the website property attached to your GSC account. Examples: https://example.com/ or sc-domain:example.com

fields.name: start_date
fields.title: Start Date
fields.description: UTC date in the format YYYY-MM-DD. Any data before this date will not be replicated.

custom_description: Connector for the Google Search Console API. Provides access to website search performance data including clicks, impressions, CTR, and average position. Supports listing verified sites, sitemaps, and querying search analytics data broken down by date, country, device, page, and query dimensions.
supported_questions:
- List all my verified sites in Search Console
- Show me the sitemaps for my website
- Get search analytics by date for the last 7 days
- Show search performance broken down by country
- What devices are people using to find my site?
- Which pages get the most clicks?
- What queries bring the most traffic to my site?
- Which country has the highest CTR for my site?
- What are my top 10 search queries by impressions?
- Compare mobile vs desktop click-through rates
- Which pages have the worst average position?
- Show me search performance trends over the last month
unsupported_questions:
- Submit a new sitemap
- Add a new site to Search Console
- Remove a site from Search Console
- Inspect a URL's index status
- Request indexing for a page

first_operation.description: Lists the user's Search Console sites.

sites.description: Lists the user's Search Console sites.

parameters.name: siteUrl
parameters.description: The URL of the property as defined in Search Console. Examples: http://www.example.com/ (for a URL-prefix property) or sc-domain:example.com (for a Domain property)

fields.name: permissionLevel
fields.description: The user's permission level for the site (owner, full, restricted, etc.)

fields.name: siteUrl
fields.description: The URL of the site data being fetched

fields.name: contents
fields.description: Data related to the sitemap contents

fields.name: errors
fields.description: Errors encountered while processing the sitemaps

fields.name: isPending
fields.description: Flag indicating if the sitemap is pending for processing

fields.name: isSitemapsIndex
fields.description: Flag indicating if the data represents a sitemap index

fields.name: lastDownloaded
fields.description: Timestamp when the sitemap was last downloaded

fields.name: lastSubmitted
fields.description: Timestamp when the sitemap was last submitted

fields.name: path
fields.description: Path to the sitemap file

fields.name: type
fields.description: Type of the sitemap

fields.name: warnings
fields.description: Warnings encountered while processing the sitemaps

fields.name: clicks
fields.description: The number of times users clicked on the search result for a specific query

fields.name: country
fields.description: The country from which the search query originated

fields.name: ctr
fields.description: Click-through rate, calculated as clicks divided by impressions

fields.name: date
fields.description: The date when the search query occurred

fields.name: device
fields.description: The type of device used by the user (e.g., desktop, mobile)

fields.name: impressions
fields.description: The number of times a search result appeared in response to a query

fields.name: page
fields.description: The page URL that appeared in the search results

fields.name: position
fields.description: The average position of the search result on the search engine results page

fields.name: query
fields.description: The search query entered by the user

fields.name: search_type
fields.description: The type of search (e.g., web, image, video) that triggered the search result

fields.name: site_url
fields.description: The URL of the site from which the data originates

fields.name: clicks
fields.description: The number of times users clicked on the search result for a specific country

fields.name: country
fields.description: The country for which the search analytics data is being reported

fields.name: ctr
fields.description: The click-through rate for a specific country

fields.name: date
fields.description: The date for which the search analytics data is being reported

fields.name: impressions
fields.description: The total number of times a search result was shown for a specific country

fields.name: position
fields.description: The average position at which the site's search result appeared for a specific country

fields.name: search_type
fields.description: The type of search for which the data is being reported

fields.name: site_url
fields.description: The URL of the site for which the search analytics data is being reported
